reason: Verify the required focused and full backend quality gates for retry/circuit changes.
Review boundary values, strict helper routes, transient reservations, and cross-request circuit counts.
Verify generated bindings, frontend validation, persistence, and runtime remain aligned.
Check attempt/route observability and prove 401/403 bodies do not leak.
Check policy writes use the authoritative settings path without stale snapshot overwrite.
Audit strict version dispatch, deterministic serialization, import rollback, and secret boundaries.
Apply edge-case and round-trip checks across every rule data boundary.
Use the source-backed reference behavior and migration inventory during review.
